caption_enhanced: The figure presents a comparison of the performance of three different classification models (liquid, fcc, hcp, and bcc) on a dataset, with each model's accuracy represented by a bar graph. The x-axis represents the actual phase of the dataset, and the y-axis represents the percentage of correctly classified samples.
key_finding: The fcc model has the highest accuracy, with an average of around 95% correct classification across all phases.
